_publications._publicationTitle: Destabilizing NF1 variants act in a dominant negative manner through neurofibromin dimerization.

_contextSnippet: Lysates from 293T NF1−/− cells expressing FLAG-tagged neurofibromin. Expression was analyzed via western blot.
details: Successfully expressed FLAG-tagged neurofibromin and mutants, showing reduced expression of 844-848 mutants compared to wild type
